word: H4994 - נָא - nâʼ - naw - I beseech thee

sections.paragraph:
Original: נא

Transliteration: nâ'

Phonetic: naw

BDB Definition:

  1. I (we) pray, now, please
    1. used in entreaty or exhortation

Origin: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered: "I pray," "now," or "then"

TWOT entry: 1269

Part(s) of speech:
